summary: The footage captures a vehicle traveling along a rural road, encountering a motorcycle approaching head-on. The motorcycle rider attempts to maneuver around the vehicle but fails, resulting in a collision.

events_timeline.event: A motorcycle approaches the ego-vehicle head-on, attempting to pass through the narrow road.

uncertainties: Exact nature of the motorcycle rider's actions post-collision is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: The motorcycle rider failed to avoid the ego-vehicle, leading to a collision.
